prompt: A professional sports collage poster of Athlete Name in a high-detail, cinematic style. The composition features a large, hyper-realistic side-profile closeup of the athlete on the left, looking forward. Overlapping this are multiple action shots: one of the athlete dribbling a ball, one celebrating with arms outstretched, and one from the back showing their jersey number. The background is a cream-colored textured paper with artistic paint splatters and watercolor bleeds in Team Colors.
